name: knowledge_lifecycle
description: Knowledge recording and lifecycle workflow. Classify → write → check promote.

nodes.description: Classify incoming knowledge: official doc → skills/external, inference → dynamic. Read checklist and report classification basis.
nodes.instruction: Read checklist: shared/workflows/checklists/knowledge_lifecycle__classify_knowledge.yaml. Classification rules: (1) Official doc / user-confirmed fact → .claude/skills-on-demand/ OR shared/kb/external/; (2) Inference / single case / observed pattern → shared/kb/dynamic/ (requires status: active marker). Submit checklist_responses with classification basis for each item.

nodes.description: Write knowledge to shared/kb/dynamic/ with proper format. New entries in learning_notes.md MUST include <!-- status: active --> marker.
nodes.instruction: For decisions: python shared/tools/kb.py add-decision --id D-NNN ... For learnings: python shared/tools/kb.py add-learning --id <prefix>-LNN --title '...' --date YYYY-MM-DD --content '...' --confidence high|medium|low. New entries in shared/kb/dynamic/*.md MUST include <!-- status: active --> marker (validator enforces). kb.py writes to both DB (source of truth) and .md (export).

nodes.description: Sync dynamic KB changes to kb_index.db after writing
nodes.instruction: Run: python shared/tools/kb.py build-edges. This updates knowledge graph edges after new nodes added. Optionally: python shared/tools/kb.py validate to check consistency.

nodes.description: Check if dynamic KB has enough validated entries to suggest /promote
nodes.instruction: Run: python shared/tools/kb.py catalog. If dynamic/ has ≥5 entries with status:active and confidence:high, suggest user run /promote for skill upgrade review.
